testcase.name: test_only_one_platform_super_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected exactly 1 active platform_super_admin, got 2: ['admin@automateaccounts.local', 'platformadmin1@test.local'] assert 2 == 1 + where 2 = len([{'access_level': 'full_access', 'company_name': 'Automate Accounts', 'created_at': '2026-02-25T21:38:24.597269+00:00', 'email': 'admin@automateaccounts.local', ...}, {'company_name': '', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T21:59:30.958139+00:00', 'created_by_admin': 'edce2cc5-1b73-4e12-8879-d486fe90f4fe', 'email': 'platformadmin1@test.local', ...}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter166_users_tab_features.py:99: in test_only_one_platform_super_admin assert len(active_psa) == 1, f"Expected exactly 1 active platform_super_admin, got {len(active_psa)}: {[u['email'] for u in active_psa]}" E AssertionError: Expected exactly 1 active platform_super_admin, got 2: ['admin@automateaccounts.local', 'platformadmin1@test.local'] E assert 2 == 1 E + where 2 = len([{'access_level': 'full_access', 'company_name': 'Automate Accounts', 'created_at': '2026-02-25T21:38:24.597269+00:00', 'email': 'admin@automateaccounts.local', ...}, {'company_name': '', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T21:59:30.958139+00:00', 'created_by_admin': 'edce2cc5-1b73-4e12-8879-d486fe90f4fe', 'email': 'platformadmin1@test.local', ...}])

testcase.name: test_cannot_create_platform_super_admin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter166_users_tab_features.py:197: in test_cannot_create_platform_super_admin assert r.status_code in (400, 403), f"Expected 400/403, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/403, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","full_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"TEST_newsuperadmin@example.com","password":"TestPass123!","role":"platform_super_admin"}}]} E assert 422 in (400, 403) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_partner_admin_role_is_valid_to_create
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter166_users_tab_features.py:212: in test_partner_admin_role_is_valid_to_create assert r.status_code in (400, 404), f"Unexpected status: {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","full_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"TEST_partneradmin@example.com","password":"TestPass123!","role":"partner_admin","target_tenant_id":"nonexistent-org-12345"}}]} E assert 422 in (400, 404) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_partner_admin_with_invalid_tenant_returns_404
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter166_users_tab_features.py:228: in test_create_partner_admin_with_invalid_tenant_returns_404 assert r.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404 for nonexistent tenant, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 404 for nonexistent tenant, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","full_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"TEST_notenant@example.com","password":"TestPass123!","role":"partner_admin","target_tenant_id":"nonexistent-tenant-xyz-999"}}]} E assert 422 == 404 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cannot_create_duplicate_partner_super_admin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter166_users_tab_features.py:255: in test_cannot_create_duplicate_partner_super_admin assert r.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for duplicate super admin, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for duplicate super admin, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","full_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"TEST_ligersuperadmin2@example.com","password":"TestPass123!","role":"partner_super_admin","target_tenant_id":"e426080b-188c-40f2-b9c8-7a9f66681e20"}}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
